name: soulforge
description: A forge for agents. Soul, tools, endpoints, memory, eval.

scripts.lint: eslint memory/**/*.ts eval/**/*.ts observability/**/*.ts tools/**/*.ts endpoints/src/**/*.ts endpoints/examples/url-inspector-with-memory/**/*.ts
scripts.scaffold:smoke: node generator/cli.mjs new ai-smoke --template research-agent --out .tmp/scaffold --force && npm --prefix .tmp/scaffold/ai-smoke install && npm --prefix .tmp/scaffold/ai-smoke run typecheck && npm --prefix .tmp/scaffold/ai-smoke run test
